text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, put your hands up in the air! Both hands,
as high as you can! Hands open, like a blooming
sakura tree!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
...Good, that's enough. Now let them down
slowly.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
Well? That's a stretching technique my father
taught me! Doesn't your body feel open and
refreshed?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
It's important to zoom ahead and keep moving
forward, but... sometimes we need a breath of
fresh air in the sunshine too. Let's both remember
to make time for that. ♪
